name: part_003
file: tmp_【 #夏色まつり誕生祭2025 】重大告知あり！アイドル革命進行中！～今日の主役は夢の途中～　【ホロラ [L-XVS13TRTI]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: Natsuiro Matsuri greets the audience and talks about her dance lessons before the guest segment.
Transition scene with falling cherry blossom petals.

scenes.song_name: サクラあっぱれーしょん (Sakura Apparition)

subtitles.original: はい、ちょっとね...
subtitles.english: Well, actually...

subtitles.original: あの、まつりちゃん本家ダンスとかが凄く大好きなので
subtitles.english: Um, Matsuri-chan really loves the original dances, so...

subtitles.original: あの、レッスンでね、「お願い！やらせてください！」って言って
subtitles.english: At my lessons, I was like, "Please! Let me do it!"

subtitles.original: フォーメーションとかもね、含め、みんなには頑張ってもらっていますので
subtitles.english: And including the formations and everything, I'm having everyone work hard on them,

subtitles.original: あの、君の推しがもしいたら、褒めてあげてください！
subtitles.english: so if your oshi is here, please give them some praise!

subtitles.original: ということで、え、ゲストパート準備してきちゃいますね！
subtitles.english: So, I'm going to go get ready for the guest part!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、みんなワクワクってコメントして待ってて。
subtitles.english: Alright everyone, please comment "waku waku" while you wait.

subtitles.original: じゃ、いってきまーい！
subtitles.english: Well, I'm off!

subtitles.original: ワクワク、ワクワク、ワクワクワクワクワクワク
subtitles.english: Waku waku, waku waku, waku waku waku waku...

subtitles.original: サクラあっぱれーしょん
subtitles.english: Sakura Apparition

subtitles.original: 作詞・作曲：玉屋2060% (Wienners)
subtitles.english: Lyrics & Composition: Tamaya 2060% (Wienners)

subtitles.original: まつり
subtitles.english: Matsuri

subtitles.original: ヘイヨーPMPMフロム秋葉原TO A-B-A
subtitles.english: Hey yo, PMPM from Akihabara to A-B-A

subtitles.original: さぁさ寄ってらっしゃい見てらっしゃい　もう一切合切やっちゃいな
subtitles.english: Come one, come all, take a look! Just go ahead and do everything!

subtitles.original: ありったけの可愛いたのしいこと詰め込んで
subtitles.english: Pack in all the cute and fun things you've got

subtitles.original: さぁヨイショヨイショお船に乗って　いざ出航じゃ！
subtitles.english: Now, heave-ho! Get on the ship! It's time to set sail!

subtitles.original: ヘイヨーPMPMフロムジャパニーズホットエリア
subtitles.english: Hey yo, PMPM from the Japanese hot area

subtitles.original: みんな元気ですか？恋させてあげて！ハイ電波！電波！
subtitles.english: Is everyone doing good? Let them fall in love! High-denpa! Denpa!

subtitles.original: ありがサンキュー準備はバッチリのよるのひるの
subtitles.english: Ariga-thank you! Preparation is perfect, night and day

subtitles.original: さぁ今から二回お船に乗って　いざ出航じゃ！
subtitles.english: Now, from here, get on the ship twice! It's time to set sail!

subtitles.original: さぁみんなダンスダンスダンス　ほら　足踏んで
subtitles.english: Now everyone, dance, dance, dance! Come on, stomp your feet!

subtitles.original: ミラーがヒラリ　格好つけてもパッパッパ
subtitles.english: The mirror flutters! Even if you try to look cool, it's pa-pa-pa!

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃな呪文見たり　それが僕らにとってのファンタジー
subtitles.english: Seeing crazy spells... that's our fantasy

subtitles.original: シュートシュート感じるんだ　酔ってるんだ
subtitles.english: Shoot, shoot, feel it! Getting drunk on it!

subtitles.original: ソレソレソレソレ
subtitles.english: Sore sore sore sore!

subtitles.original: シッシッシッ胸を張っては汗たらり
subtitles.english: Shi shi shi, puffing out our chests, sweat trickling down

subtitles.original: ずっと知ってもコジコジ逆方向
subtitles.english: Even if you know, go the opposite way, coji-coji

subtitles.original: 青春はそれでいいのだ
subtitles.english: That's what youth is all about!

subtitles.original: 勘違いも味方にしちゃうのだ
subtitles.english: Let's make even misunderstandings our allies!

subtitles.original: ジパング日本　踊れ日本　ソレソレソレ　よいしょー！
subtitles.english: Zipangu, Japan! Dance, Japan! Sore sore sore, heave-ho!

subtitles.original: 珍道中　さぁどこまでも
subtitles.english: An eccentric journey, let's go everywhere

subtitles.original: ほらパワフル全開で突き抜けろ
subtitles.english: Look, break through with full power!

subtitles.original: あっちもこっちもそっちも　まつりだワッショイ
subtitles.english: Here, there, and everywhere, it's a Matsuri festival, wasshoi!

subtitles.original: あっぱれあっぱれアドベンチャー
subtitles.english: Splendid, splendid adventure!

subtitles.original: ヤマトナデシコ　エマ　不思議な言霊
subtitles.english: Yamato Nadeshiko, Emma, mysterious power of words

subtitles.original: ハッハッハッ
subtitles.english: Ha ha ha!

subtitles.original: 奇想天外　さぁいつまでも
subtitles.english: Bizarre and fantastic, let's go forever

subtitles.original: 神様仏様うさぎ様
subtitles.english: God, Buddha, and Mr. Rabbit

subtitles.original: 月に祈って拝んで　ヒニを思って
subtitles.english: Praying and worshiping the moon, thinking of the day

subtitles.original: 半端な気持ちを断ち切って
subtitles.english: Cutting off any half-hearted feelings

subtitles.original: とりあえず今は黙ってついてこい
subtitles.english: For now, just shut up and follow me!

subtitles.original: フォローミー
subtitles.english: Follow me!

subtitles.original: オーオー　君の未来を明るく照らすなんて
subtitles.english: Oh oh! To brightly illuminate your future...

subtitles.original: お茶の子さいさいさい！
subtitles.english: It's a piece of cake-cake-cake!

subtitles.original: 百花繚乱　大和撫子たちよ
subtitles.english: Profusion of flowers, oh Yamato Nadeshikos!

subtitles.original: どでかい花火を上げましょうね
subtitles.english: Let's set off some huge fireworks!

subtitles.original: ほら踊る阿呆に見る阿呆
subtitles.english: Look, there are fools who dance and fools who watch

subtitles.original: 同じ阿呆なら踊らにゃ損損！
subtitles.english: If we're both fools, we might as well dance!

subtitles.original: さぁみんなダンスダンスダンス　ほら　足踏んで
subtitles.english: Now everyone, dance, dance, dance! Come on, stomp your feet!

subtitles.original: おへそチラリ　くつ脱いだらソクソク破れてる
subtitles.english: A glimpse of the belly button! When I take off my shoes, the socks are torn!

subtitles.original: ドタバタなこのステージ　これが私にとっての誠意
subtitles.english: This hectic stage, this is my sincerity

subtitles.original: 一生懸命羽ばたくんだ　聞こえるんだ
subtitles.english: Flapping my wings with all my might! I can hear it!

subtitles.original: ソレソレソレソレ
subtitles.english: Sore sore sore sore!

subtitles.original: シッシッシッ胸を張って涙キラリ
subtitles.english: Shi shi shi, puffing out my chest, a glint of tears

subtitles.original: 強がってもキュンキュン苦しいの
subtitles.english: Even if I act tough, my heart is aching!

subtitles.original: 乙女はそれでいいのだ　マイナスも味方にしちゃうのだ
subtitles.english: That's what girls are all about! Let's make even negatives our allies!

subtitles.original: 全力愛してんだ　みんな大好きだ
subtitles.english: I love you with all my heart! I love you all!

subtitles.original: ダダダダダ　ブレイクダウン！
subtitles.english: Da-da-da-da-da, break down!

subtitles.original: 珍道中　さぁどこまでも
subtitles.english: An eccentric journey, let's go everywhere

subtitles.original: ほらパワフル全開で突き抜けろ
subtitles.english: Look, break through with full power!

subtitles.original: あっちもこっちもそっちも　まつりだワッショイ
subtitles.english: Here, there, and everywhere, it's a Matsuri festival, wasshoi!

subtitles.original: あっぱれあっぱれアドベンチャー
subtitles.english: Splendid, splendid adventure!

subtitles.original: ヤマトナデシコ　エマ　不思議な言霊
subtitles.english: Yamato Nadeshiko, Emma, mysterious power of words

subtitles.original: ハッハッハッ
subtitles.english: Ha ha ha!

subtitles.original: 奇想天外　さぁいつまでも
subtitles.english: Bizarre and fantastic, let's go forever

subtitles.original: 神様仏様うさぎ様
subtitles.english: God, Buddha, and Mr. Rabbit

subtitles.original: 月に祈って拝んで　ヒニを思って
subtitles.english: Praying and worshiping the moon, thinking of the day

subtitles.original: 半端な気持ちを断ち切って
subtitles.english: Cutting off any half-hearted feelings

subtitles.original: とりあえず今は黙ってついてこい
subtitles.english: For now, just shut up and follow me!

subtitles.original: フォローミー
subtitles.english: Follow me!

subtitles.original: オーオー　君の未来を明るく照らすなんて
subtitles.english: Oh oh! To brightly illuminate your future...

subtitles.original: お茶の子さいさいさい！
subtitles.english: It's a piece of cake-cake-cake!

subtitles.original: よいしょ！
subtitles.english: Heave-ho!

subtitles.original: はい！満月の下で踊りましょう
subtitles.english: Yes! Let's dance under the full moon!

subtitles.original: 桜舞い散る季節に歌いましょう
subtitles.english: Let's sing in the season of falling cherry blossoms!

subtitles.original: 君といつかまた出会うその日まで
subtitles.english: Until the day we meet again sometime

subtitles.original: お空にお天道様　お星様　あなた様
subtitles.english: To the sun in the sky, the stars, and to you

subtitles.original: わーっ！みんなでバイバイさよならー！
subtitles.english: Wah! Everyone, bye-bye, goodbye!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!
